title: Execute the guarded Nextflow raw-data route on a real public sample
description: Prove that the raw-data orchestration path can launch a real Nextflow job on a real local public sample manifest, with provenance captured even if the pipeline fails downstream.
acceptance_criteria:
- a real raw-input manifest is staged for a public sample
- scripts/raw_data_route.py runs with --execute
- workflow_run.json, commands.jsonl, and pipeline log artifacts are written under runs/
- success versus launch-only versus failure is stated explicitly

title: Run CMRG hap.py benchmark on real public inputs
description: Execute the repo-local CMRG wrapper in real execution mode against locally staged benchmark inputs so difficult medically relevant regions are proven separately from easy-region HG002 metrics.
acceptance_criteria:
- CMRG public inputs are staged locally without mutating raw files
- scripts/cmrg_evaluation.py is executed in live mode
- scorecard outputs and commands.jsonl are emitted under runs/
- unsupported or failed regions remain explicit

title: Run HG002 hap.py benchmark on real public inputs
description: Execute the repo-local HG002 benchmark wrapper in real execution mode against locally staged public truth and query inputs. The outcome must be a real run record, not only dry-run or parse-only output.
acceptance_criteria:
- HG002 public inputs are staged locally without mutating raw files
- scripts/hg002_benchmark.py is executed in live mode
- metrics.json and commands.jsonl are emitted under runs/
- any failure is preserved with logs and a concrete blocker note

title: Validate local execution environment for hap.py and Nextflow
description: Before claiming end-to-end execution, confirm the workstation can actually run the required external tools and capture versions reproducibly. This issue is the gate for all live proof runs.
acceptance_criteria:
- hap.py availability and invocation path are recorded
- nextflow availability and invocation path are recorded
- runtime prerequisites such as container engine or Java are recorded
- environment notes are written under a run or docs artifact with exact versions

title: Prove live public-data execution against pinned proof datasets
description: Wrappers, manifests, and docs exist for public proof datasets, but the repo still lacks confirmed live execution on real public inputs. Close this only after we have recorded reproducible local runs, or explicit evidence-backed blockers, for HG002, CMRG, huFE0257, the selected 1000 Genomes cohort, and the guarded raw-data Nextflow route.
acceptance_criteria:
- live public-data proof runs are tracked in child issues
- each child issue records commands, outputs, and blockers
- residual unconfirmed areas are explicit at epic close

title: Document proof backlog in roadmap and simplify OSS repo navigation
description: The repo already contains the proof-program materials, but the public-facing docs are split across README, ROADMAP, DEMO_BACKLOG, and docs stubs in a way that feels messy for OSS readers. Align the roadmap with the live-proof backlog and reduce navigation friction.
acceptance_criteria:
- roadmap records the still-unconfirmed live proof work and points to the active Beads backlog
- README points OSS readers to one roadmap and one active backlog source
- docs navigation has a small index or clear entrypoint
- older backlog prose is downgraded to archive or context, not presented as the active tracker
close_reason: Closed
